measurement: AR range-dependent auto-aim CORE-HIT rate (per normal shot) — HARDENED read (coreband2)
focusReason: solo recording — Moran is the only unit on field (all other Battle-Records slots EMPTY), so ALL normal-attack popups are hers; a lone unit never triggers the team Full Burst state, so these are clean OUT-OF-FB reads. Core rate is FB-independent (aim geometry).
treasureCheck: Recording shows the purple favorite-item (Treasure) gem on Moran's portrait -> Treasure IS equipped, which MATCHES sim moran (characters.json treasure:true). Core-RATE is treasure-independent (aim geometry) regardless; noted for any later TOTAL reconciliation.
overview: 1-frame-per-8s sheet: single continuous run, no aborted first attempt. The two OPERATION CLEAR tiles (v184/v192) are the damage-tally count-up animation reaching the final 25,226,929, not two attempts.

clock.method: top-right MM:SS countdown; fightClock t = 180 - remaining. Countdown runs ~1.75% FAST vs the recording clock, so the video->fight-clock offset DRIFTS — anchored at 7 reads and fitted linearly.
clock.note: Fight starts ~v7.7 (fc 0). ~1.75% countdown drift confirmed (matches the ~1.8% expectation).

colourConvention.white: normal NON-core (base B). Measured B = 11747 at near/far; 15270 in the first ~30s and in the fc106-144 window (a time-cycling ~1.30x self-buff, see confounds). Classification is RATIO-based per band, not absolute value.
colourConvention.orange+critIcon: crit NON-core = 1.5x B (near 17620 = 11747x1.5; mid/midfar 21744-22905 = 15270x~1.5). Crit crown icon, NO 'CORE HIT' text.
colourConvention.red 'CORE HIT': CORE hit (counted) = 2.0x B (near 23493 = 11747x2; mid/midfar ~30540-32890 = 15270x2). Red number + red 'CORE HIT' text.
colourConvention.orange 'CORE HIT'+critIcon: core+crit (counted CORE) = 2.5x B (near 29368 = 11747x2.5). Orange-toned number that RETAINS the 'CORE HIT' text plus a crit icon.
colourConvention.classificationRule: CORE iff the popup carries the 'CORE HIT' text (red OR orange). NON-CORE = white (normal) or orange-with-crit-icon-and-NO-'CORE HIT' (plain crit). Classified by the CORE HIT text label, not number colour hue (R3).
colourConvention.additiveNote: Core and crit bonuses are ADDITIVE, not multiplicative: normal 1.0x, crit +50% -> 1.5x, core +100% -> 2.0x, core+crit +150% -> 2.5x (measured 11747/17620/23493/29368). This makes the reconciliation cross-term vanish (see reconciliation.solve).

r3CoreCritRenderCheck.result: CONFIRMED. A core+crit renders ORANGE with the 'CORE HIT' text retained (29366 = 11747x2.5), NOT masked into a plain orange crit (17620 = 11747x1.5). A pure core is red 'CORE HIT' (23493). A colour-only 'red=core' scan would misclassify the orange core+crit as a plain crit and undercount; classifying by the CORE HIT TEXT captures both.
r3CoreCritRenderCheck.evidenceFrames: scratchpad/moran/basez/base_sheet.png (v50.5 ammo 038: orange 'CORE HIT' 29366 + red 'CORE HIT' 23493 + white 11747 in one stack); scratchpad/moran/n2z (v160.6/163.4 orange 'CORE HIT' 29366).

excluded: Red laser TRACER beam (persistent diagonal red line, no number)
Red radial BLOOM orbs on the boss arms/weapons (boss VFX, no number inside)
The reticle AMMO counter box (0N0->000) — turns RED when ammo is low (<=~28); it is a boxed UI counter at the crosshair, NOT a core popup
Red 'TARGET / LOCK' UI chevrons and target-lock text
Moran's burst-window skill1 riders (47.18% ATK 'additional damage', only fire during her weapon-changed burst mode; excluded by only reconciling normal-ammo mags)
cyan BLOCK! and cyan crown-shield boss-hit numbers over the character
method: Per band, extracted full-res crosshair-region frames at ~0.7s spacing (each an independent popup stack; AR popups live <0.6s at ~12 shots/s so no cross-frame double-count -> a RATE is unbiased under independent sampling). Classified each legible NORMAL popup as core ('CORE HIT' text, red or orange) vs non-core (white/orange-crit). Heavy same-crosshair overlap (~7 popups alive at once) limits legible reads to the top of each stack; the NEAR band is additionally pinned by an ammo-counter + damage-total RECONCILIATION (visibility-independent). Boss apparent size cross-checked vs band label each band.

bands.bossDistance: medium (boss centre / centre-right); popups physically smaller (harder-to-read) than near
bands.confidence: medium-low — cores clearly present (red 'CORE HIT' ~30540/32890 and orange 'CORE HIT' 29366) but at moderate frequency; count noisy due to overlap and smaller mid popups (possible mild core undercount).

bands.bossDistance: close / large (near1 v48-53 point-blank centre; near2 v159-164 medium-close, boss right) — largest apparent size of the fight (matches 'near')
bands.confidence: HIGH — direct count 0.40 AGREES with the visibility-independent reconciliation 0.40 (see reconciliation block); two independent near windows (near1 0.43, near2 0.39).

bands.bossDistance: distant / small (boss centre, smallest apparent size, ~half the midfar apparent width) (matches 'far')
bands.confidence: high that it is ~0 — white/orange numbers pop clearly against grey sky, any red 'CORE HIT' would be obvious. Two stray cores (one clear red 23493 at v100 fc~94; one occluded 'CORE HIT' at the near->far edge v78) give ~0.05, effectively near-zero.

bands.bossDistance: MEDIUM (boss centre-left, ~2x the far apparent width) — on THIS footage the fc106-144 window has the boss at medium distance, NOT far; the fc176-180 tail is essentially spent (fight ending).
bands.confidence: medium — cores clearly present (red 'CORE HIT' ~32890) because the boss sits at medium range in this window; distinct from Scarlet's midfar (0.03), where that window's boss was genuinely farther.

bossDistanceCrossCheck.apparentSizeOrdering: near1 (largest, point-blank) > near2 ~ mid > midfar (medium) > far (smallest)
bossDistanceCrossCheck.note: Range script holds for near (closest) and far (smallest). The scripted 'midfar' (fc106-144) window shows the boss at MEDIUM apparent size on this footage (~2x the far boss), so cores occur there (0.14) — the core rate tracks ACTUAL apparent distance, and mid+midfar are both 'medium range'. Pooled medium (mid+midfar): 15/99 = 0.152, which matches Scarlet's pooled medium (mid 0.30 + midfar 0.03 -> ~0.165).

reconciliation.purpose: Visibility-independent NEAR core rate, robust to red-on-dark-boss unreadability. Anchored on the AR reticle AMMO counter (Moran's mag = 60 rounds; reticle shows an exact 060->000 count = ground-truth shot count) + the running per-unit DAMAGE total read at mag start/end. Both mags are normal-weapon fire (ammo counts down normally => NOT her unlimited-ammo burst mode => NO skill1 riders).
reconciliation.solve: With ADDITIVE core+crit (1.0/1.5/2.0/2.5), avgOverBase = 1 + c + 0.5k (the ck cross-term cancels), where c = core-involved rate, k = crit-involved rate. => c + 0.5k = 0.504.
reconciliation.hardCeiling: c <= 0.504 regardless of crit rate (max at k=0). Any positive crit rate lowers c.
reconciliation.critRate: Solo, no crit-rate buffs in kit, no cube (validation basis) -> base crit ~15%; visible orange-crit fraction ~0.15-0.20 -> best k ~0.15-0.20 -> c ~0.40-0.43.
reconciliation.resolution: NEAR AR core rate ~0.40. The reconciliation (0.40, visibility-independent, two ammo-verified 60-round mags, directly-measured per-type values) and the direct 'CORE HIT'-text count (0.40, n=45) AGREE — high confidence. Unlike Scarlet (whose direct 0.44 sat above its reconciliation 0.34), Moran's two methods coincide.
reconciliation.savedFrames: scratchpad/moran/recon/ (ammo-boundary strips), scratchpad/moran/tot/ (total strips), scratchpad/moran/basez/ (per-type value stack). Ephemeral — regenerate from videoSec above.

summary.headline: Moran's AR auto-aim core rate is strongly range-dependent: ~0.40 when the boss is CLOSE (near, confirmed by BOTH a 120-shot ammo/total reconciliation AND a 45-popup direct count, both = 0.40) and falls with range (medium mid/midfar ~0.14-0.16, distant far ~0.05). This FIRMS the AR near value at ~0.40 and reproduces Scarlet's AR band shape without Scarlet's ~10% non-core-error concern.
summary.mechanistic: The single AR bullet lands on the boss's small central core only when the boss is close enough that the crosshair sits over the core; beyond ~medium range the auto-aim shot registers on the body -> no core. Additive core(+100%)/crit(+50%) rendering confirmed.
confounds: Base white value cycles 11747 <-> 15270 (~1.30x) on a time schedule (buffed first ~30s + fc106-144). Classification is RATIO-based per band and the reconciliation measures base per-mag, so neither is affected; mechanism of the 1.30x buff not resolved (does not match her burst ATK+42.57%).
Heavy AR popup overlap (~12 shots/s, ~7 popups alive) caps legible direct reads to the top of each stack -> per-band direct counts carry ~+/-0.05-0.08; the NEAR reconciliation is not subject to this.
Red confounds (laser tracer, boss bloom orbs, AoE tint, low-ammo red counter box, TARGET-LOCK UI) were excluded by counting only 'CORE HIT'-text NUMBERS.
'midfar' scripted window (fc106-144) has the boss at MEDIUM (not far) apparent distance on this footage -> its 0.14 is a medium-range reading, not a far one (see bossDistanceCrossCheck).
summary.vsScarlet: Scarlet AR (coreband-scarlet-ar.json): near 0.40 (recon 0.34 / direct 0.44), mid 0.30, midfar 0.03, far 0.00. Moran AR: near 0.40 (recon 0.40 / direct 0.40), mid 0.16, midfar 0.14, far 0.05. NEAR agrees at ~0.40. mid/midfar differ per-band (Moran spreads medium-range cores across both windows; Scarlet concentrated them in mid) but the pooled medium-range rate agrees (~0.15-0.17). Both far ~0. Moran removes Scarlet's non-core-error concern and confirms AR near ~0.40.
summary.simRelevance: Engine AUTO_CORE_RATE / CORE_BY_WEAPON_BAND: two clean AR reads now converge on near ~0.40 (Moran) and 0.34-0.44 (Scarlet). A flat 0.85 badly over-credits near and grossly over-credits far/medium. Supports an AR near value of ~0.40 with a steep range falloff (medium ~0.15, far ~0.05). Single boss with a small core — do NOT over-generalise across bosses. Measurement only; do NOT edit engine constants without owner + Fable review.
